items.title: AI videos of sexualised black women removed from TikTok after BBC investigation
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Qatari and Turkish citizens die in military helicopter crash
items.dek: Four Qatari military personnel, one Turkish serviceman and two technicians from a Turkish defence company were on board.
items.body: Four Qatari military personnel, one Turkish serviceman and two technicians from a Turkish defence company were on board.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Sudan army denies carrying out hospital attack that killed 64 during Eid
items.dek: The strike killed 64 people, including 13 children, two nurses and a doctor, according to the WHO head.
items.body: The strike killed 64 people, including 13 children, two nurses and a doctor, according to the WHO head.
